title: Crystall staff
description: This resource pack replaces the netherite sword with a crystal staff by renaming it on the anvil!
body: This resource pack replaces the netherite sword with a crystal staff by renaming it on the anvil! Also, for correct operation you need to use Optifine or factories with mods that replace Optifine! Well, don’t forget to subscribe to the resource pack and me :)
